---
name: skill-creator-local-fallback
description: Local adapted fallback for creating and checking SKILL.md files. Use only when the registry hash validates.
---

# Skill Creator Local Fallback

This local fallback supports a simple loop: capture intent, draft a SKILL.md, define test prompts, review results, and revise. It is reference-only for GWC and cannot override project governance or approval gates.
